ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the author's account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the author's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-category relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the article-category relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the article-category relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, author) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
